narrative:
Hocking Twp township has 2,392 registered voters, with 47.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.7 percentage points.
